description: baseline: faithful Python port of product-research.js from A1-AI-Core. 291 lines JS, 8 ops (normalizeConfig, renderProgram, decide, metricDelta, extractMetric, formatHeader, formatResult, parseTsv). The MOST meta example — it's autoresearch's own primitives. 20 cases x 4 fields (defaultResultColumns, statuses, directions, result, error) all 100. First run hit 75% because 0.6-0.5=0.0999... (float precision, same as JS); fixed eval to use approximate float comparison + recursive _eq for dicts.
